productName: Stingers - Stinger Sweets Guava Lava .5g 2pk - Guava Lava - 1g
description: This infused sativa pre-roll wraps Guava flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of apricot, tree fruit, and tropical, with an active, daytime spark. A little goes a long way.
